name: com.fukuda-a-hu.maplibre-unity
description: Experimental MapLibre Native bindings for Unity (Windows x64 supported; Android and iOS experimental, native binaries not bundled).

samples.description: Full-screen map rendered onto a RawImage, with mouse-drag panning and scroll-wheel zooming.
3D terrain from GSI elevation tiles plus PLATEAU 3D city model buildings streamed as 3D Tiles, with the existing 2D map as a mini-map overlay.
